title: Dirty Heroes
writer: Dino Verde, Vincenzo Mannino, Alberto De Martino
actors: Frederick Stafford, Daniela Bianchi, Curd Jürgens
plot: Holland. Spring 1945. Two armies face each other in the final confrontation of World War II. On the one hand are the powerful forces of the Allies, on the other, all that remains of the Third Reich. -Leigh Thomas
